chunks.text:
# Business Glossary - E-Commerce Domain (Simplified)

This document defines the core business concepts for the e-commerce platform test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase.

**Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, an... [TRUNCATED]

**Business Context**: Line items break down orders into individual product purchases. Each captures the price at the moment of ordering.

**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price

**Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item
- Cannot be modified after order confirmation
- Unit price is fixed and does not chan... [TRUNCATED]

Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer
- A Sales Order has one or more Order Line Items
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

Order Line Item Relationships:
- An Order Line Item is part of exactly one Sales Order
- An Order Line Item references exactly one Product

Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order

Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order
- A Shipment co... [TRUNCATED]

## MODIFIED FOR TEST A
Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled.

## SECOND MODIFICATION — extra term
Return Policy: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund.

# Data Dictionary - E-Commerce Database (Simplified)

This document describes the physical database schema for the simplified e-commerce test dataset.

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
CUSTOMER_MASTER
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Master record for all registered platform customers.

**Primary Key**: CUST_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-----------... [TRUNCATED]

**Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID)

**Business Concept Mapping**: SalesOrder

────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)

**Column Details**:
| Column | Type | Description | Nullable |
|--------|------|-------------|----------|
| LINE_ID | INT | Unique line identifier | NO... [TRUNCATED]

CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID

TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference)

SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

BUSINESS CONCEPT TO TABLE MAPPING
═════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════

Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER
Product          → TB_PRODUCT
SalesOrder     ... [TRUNCATED]

triplets.subject: Sales Order
triplets.object: customer, items, payment status, delivery information

triplets.subject: Order Line Item
triplets.object: single line within a Sales Order

triplets.subject: Line item
triplets.object: Unit price at time of order

triplets.subject: Return Policy
triplets.object: Products can be returned within 30 days of purchase for a full refund

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Master
entities_post_resolution.definition: A customer master dataset/table containing customer records identified by CUST_ID, referenced by foreign keys from related tables (e.g., orders).
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Foreign Keys**:
- CUST_ID → CUSTOMER_MASTER(CUST_ID) | Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER
Product          → TB_PRODUCT
SalesOrder       → SALES_ORDER_HDR
OrderLineItem    → ORDER_LINE_ITEM
Category         → TB_CATEGORY
Payment          → PAYMENT
Shipment         → SHIPMENT | CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer
entities_post_resolution.definition: A customer is an individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase and may receive refunds for cancelled orders.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Definition**: An individual or entity registered on the platform who has made at least one purchase. | **Business Context**: Customers are the primary actors in the e-commerce system. They browse products, place orders, and receive shipments. | **Key Attributes**:
- Unique Customer ID | **Key Attributes**:
- Valid email address (required for login) | **Key Attributes**:
- One or more delivery/billing addresses | **Key Attributes**:
- Geographic region for tax calculation | **Key Attributes**:
- Active/inactive status | **Business Rules**:
- Must place at least one order to remain active | **Business Rules**:
- Can have multiple addresses but only one primary per type | **Business Rules**:
- Data retained for 7 years after last purchase | **Key Attributes**:
- References exactly one Customer | **Related Concepts**: Customer, OrderLineItem, CustomerAddress | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order is placed by exactly one Customer | CUSTOMER_MASTER
──────────────────────────────────

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Address
entities_post_resolution.definition: The Customer Address is the destination address associated with a Customer to which shipments are delivered in the order/shipment domain.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment goes to exactly one Customer Address | **Related Concepts**: Customer, OrderLineItem, CustomerAddress

entities_post_resolution.name: Line Item
entities_post_resolution.definition: A line item is a single product entry on a sales order that records the quantity ordered, the unit price at the time of order, and the resulting extended amount for that product.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique line identifier
- References exactly one Product
- Quantity of units ordered
- Unit price at time of order (historical, not current)
- Extended amount = quantity × unit price | **Business Rules**:
- A Sales Order must contain at least one line item

entities_post_resolution.name: Order Line Item.Product Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: The foreign key field ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID that links each order line item to its parent SALES_ORDER_HDR (order) in the sales order domain.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Header record for each customer sales order.

**Primary Key**: ORDER_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment)
 | **Foreign Keys**:
- ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID) | ORDER_LINE_ITEM
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Individual product lines within a sales order.

**Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment)
 | **Primary Key**: LINE_ID (INT, auto-increment) | Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER
Product          → TB_PRODUCT
SalesOrder       → SALES_ORDER_HDR
OrderLineItem    → ORDER_LINE_ITEM
Category         → TB_CATEGORY
Payment          → PAYMENT
Shipment         → SHIPMENT | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID | **Key Attributes**:
- Must contain at least one Order Line Item | **Definition**: A single line within a Sales Order specifying a Product, quantity, and unit price at t

entities_post_resolution.name: Customer Order
entities_post_resolution.definition: A customer-initiated request to purchase goods or services, represented as an order, which can be canceled and may involve refunds.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text: Refund: A reimbursement issued to a customer when an order is cancelled. | **Synonyms**: order, purchase order, transaction, customer order

entities_post_resolution.name: Tb Category.Parent Category Id
entities_post_resolution.definition: TB_CATEGORY represents the hierarchical product category dimension, identified by CATEGORY_ID and linked via a self-referencing PARENT_CATEGORY_ID to form a category tree.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  └── TB_CATEGORY.PARENT_CATEGORY_ID (self-reference) | **Foreign Keys**:
- PARENT_CATEGORY_ID → TB_CATEGORY(CATEGORY_ID) [self-reference]
 | TB_CATEGORY
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Hierarchical product category tree.

**Primary Key**: CATEGORY_ID (INT, auto-increment)
 | Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER
Product          → TB_PRODUCT
SalesOrder       → SALES_ORDER_HDR
OrderLineItem    → ORDER_LINE_ITEM
Category         → TB_CATEGORY
Payment          → PAYMENT
Shipment         → SHIPMENT | TB_CATEGORY.CATEGORY_ID
  ├── TB_PRODUCT.CATEGORY_ID | **Foreign Keys**:
- CATEGORY_ID → TB_CATEGORY(CATEGORY_ID)
 | **Foreign Keys**:
- PRODUCT_ID → TB_PRODUCT(PRODUCT_ID) | TB_PRODUCT.PRODUCT_ID
  └── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.PRODUCT_ID

entities_post_resolution.name: Payment
entities_post_resolution.definition: The Payment entity represents a payment transaction associated with a Sales Order, identified by a unique payment ID, and characterized by attributes such as payment method, amount, confirmation timestamp, and status.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique Payment ID
- References exactly one Sales Order
- Payment method (credit card, PayPal, bank transfer)
- Payment amount
- Confirmation timestamp
- Status: PENDING, CONFIRMED, FAILED, REFUNDED | Payment Relationships:
- A Payment is for exactly one Sales Order | Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER
Product          → TB_PRODUCT
SalesOrder       → SALES_ORDER_HDR
OrderLineItem    → ORDER_LINE_ITEM
Category         → TB_CATEGORY
Payment          → PAYMENT
Shipment         → SHIPMENT | **Primary Key**: PAYMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Payments

entities_post_resolution.name: Sales Order Hdr
entities_post_resolution.definition: A canonical entity representing the sales order header table, containing one row per customer order with ORDER_ID as the primary key and CUST_ID linking to the customer; this header is referenced by related line item and payment records.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
SALES_ORDER_HDR
────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
**Description**: Header record for each customer sales order.

**Primary Key**: ORDER_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment)
 | **Foreign Keys**:
- ORDER_ID → SALES_ORDER_HDR(ORDER_ID) | CUSTOMER_MASTER.CUST_ID
  └── SALES_ORDER_HDR.CUST_ID | Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER
Product          → TB_PRODUCT
SalesOrder       → SALES_ORDER_HDR
OrderLineItem    → ORDER_LINE_ITEM
Category         → TB_CATEGORY
Payment          → PAYMENT
Shipment         → SHIPMENT | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── ORDER_LINE_ITEM.ORDER_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  ├── PAYMENT.ORDER_ID | SALES_ORDER_HDR.ORDER_ID
  └── SHIPMENT.ORDER_ID

entities_post_resolution.name: Shipment
entities_post_resolution.definition: The record representing the physical delivery of products from a warehouse to a customer's delivery address.
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Key Attributes**:
- Unique Shipment ID
- References exactly one Sales Order
- Source Warehouse
- Destination Customer Address
- Shipped timestamp
- Tracking number
- Status: PREPARING, SHIPPED, IN_TRANSIT, DELIVERED | **Definition**: The physical delivery of Products from a Warehouse to a Customer's delivery address. | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment is for exactly one Sales Order | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment comes from exactly one Warehouse | Shipment Relationships:
- A Shipment goes to exactly one Customer Address | Customer         → CUSTOMER_MASTER
Product          → TB_PRODUCT
SalesOrder       → SALES_ORDER_HDR
OrderLineItem    → ORDER_LINE_ITEM
Category         → TB_CATEGORY
Payment          → PAYMENT
Shipment         → SHIPMENT | **Primary Key**: SHIPMENT_ID (BIGINT, auto-increment) | Sales Order Relationships:
- A Sales Order has one or more Shipments

entities_post_resolution.name: 7 Years After
entities_post_resolution.definition:
**Business Rules**:
- Data retained for 7 years after last purchase
entities_post_resolution.provenance_text:
**Business Rules**:

tables_enriched.name: Customer Master
tables_enriched.description: Stores core customer records including identifying information, contact details, region, account status, and the timestamp when the customer was created.

tables_enriched.name: Product
tables_enriched.description: Stores product catalog information, including identifiers, stock-keeping unit, name, category reference, price, and whether the product is active.

tables_enriched.name: Category
tables_enriched.description: Stores hierarchical category information for products, including each category's name and its parent category reference.

tables_enriched.name: Sales Order Header
tables_enriched.description: Stores header-level information for sales orders, including customer reference, order date, total amount, status, and timestamps for payment confirmation, delivery, and record creation.

tables_enriched.name: Order Line Item
tables_enriched.description: Stores the individual line items for each order, including the product, quantity, unit price, and extended line amount.

tables_enriched.name: Payment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of payments processed for customer orders, including method, amount, status, and timestamps for confirmation and creation.

tables_enriched.name: Shipment
tables_enriched.description: Stores records of shipments sent to fulfill customer orders, including the linked order, warehouse, shipment date, tracking, and current status.
